content:
# Recommendations — after iter-078

## CRITICAL — close `case hstar` (the de-risked, fully-specified mechanical residual)
- **SOLO `prove` on PresheafDualPullback.lean L1062.** FC-opacity is RESOLVED; LHS fully reduced to
  `φ.app(slice)`. The remaining `sorry` is a thin-poset / naturality coherence with an **exact dual
  template**: `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:4955–4967` →
  `rw [restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app]; erw [← M.presheaf.map_comp]; congr 1; exact Subsingleton.elim _ _`,
  with the `eqToIso`/`z` ground-reindexes reconciled via `φ`'s `naturality_apply`.
  Ingredients all exist: `restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app` (Sheaf.lean:401, `@[simp]`, `rfl`),
  `Scheme.Hom.comp_image` (slice domain equality), `Subsingleton` (thin `Over (Opens X)`), `naturality_apply`.
  Heavy elaboration (12.8M HB); budget 2–3 trace-guided builds.
- **HARD WATCH (escalation gate):** if this close does NOT land next iter, the route is genuinely STUCK —
  do NOT re-diagnose FC (it is fully reduced, no LHS blocker remains to rename). Escalate: effort-break the
  L1062 residual into (slice-Subsingleton) + (RHS restrictFunctorComp reindex) + (naturality reconcile)
  sub-lemmas, or deeper analogist on the `restrictFunctorComp` sectionwise reindex. NO further raw grind.

## HIGH — blueprint reconcile (lvb-checker `presheafdualpullback-iter078`, 2 major)
- blueprint-writer on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:presheafdual_pullback_comparison_restrict`:
  (a) drop the stale `slice_dual_transport_comp` + `conjugate_equiv_leftadjointcompiso_hom` `\uses` edges
  and the FC-mate close-route prose (bypassed in Lean); rewrite the close route to the realised form
  (`leftAdjointCompIso_hom_app` + `pushforwardComp=Iso.refl` + local `ppadj`/`dual_map` value lemmas →
  `Subsingleton`/`restrictFunctorComp_hom_app_app`/`naturality_apply`). `% NOTE` already placed in-tex.
  (b) add a blueprint block for `dual_map_app_apply` (load-bearing, currently no entry).

## MEDIUM
- **Coverage debt (3 new `lean_aux`, planner to blueprint):**
  - `PresheafOfModules.ppadj_unit_app_app_apply` (PresheafDualPullback.lean:237) — `:= rfl` re-statement of
    root private `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_unit_app_app_apply`. Uses: `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`.
  - `PresheafOfModules.ppadj_counit_app_app_apply` (L250) — `:= rfl` re-statement of root private
    `pushforwardPushforwardAdj_counit_app_app_apply`. Uses: `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`.
  - `PresheafOfModules.dual_map_app_apply` (L267) — `:= rfl` sectionwise dual-restriction value. Uses:
    `ofPresheaf_map`, `internalHomPresheaf`/`restrictionMap`, `pushforward₀` map.
  - 120 unmatched `lean_aux` total (was 118; +3 this session) — standing backlog for the planner.
- **TensorObjInverse.lean {1128,1186,1222,1990}** stay SOLO-deferred until c.2 closes
  (SliceTransport→DualInverse→PresheafDualPullback→TensorObjInverse one import chain ⇒ iter-029 build race).
  Co-dispatch S3/S4a/(b)/telescope against the green sibling only once `case hstar` lands.

## LOW (auditor `iter078`, 3 major — all comment/label hygiene, no must-fix)
- In-code comments mislabel the edit as **iter-079** (prover off-by-one vs real iter-078); a borderline
  `DRAFT` comment sits on the load-bearing block; one stale "next pass" temporal claim. Have the next
  prover that touches L1062 fix these when it edits.

## Do NOT
- Do NOT build another `sliceDualTransport`/slice brick — confirmed iter-077 not the closer; the residual
  is pushforward/thin-poset content, now fully on the LHS-reduced `φ.app` form.
- Do NOT attempt `rw [show FC.hom = pushforwardComp.hom from rfl]` (type mismatch + bomb) or in-file
  `simp` unfold of `pushforwardPushforwardAdj` `where` fields (restrictScalars carrier diamond) — both DEAD.
